User.title: User
User.description: A registered user of the site.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: A community post created by a user.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The profile picture URL of the author.

content.description: The text content of the post.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the post was created.

replyCount.description: The number of replies to this post.

Reply.title: Reply
Reply.description: A reply to a community post.

postId.description: The ID of the post this reply belongs to.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the reply.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The profile picture URL of the author.

content.description: The text content of the reply.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the reply was created.

/posts/{postId}/replies/{replyId}.description: Stores replies to a specific post.
